name: 3pc Ceramic Bath Set - Bullseye's Playground™
description: Add a touch of charm to your bathroom with this 3-piece ceramic bath set from Bullseye's Playground. This multicolored set includes a soap or lotion dispenser, a toothbrush holder, and a soap dish, all crafted from durable ceramic. The vibrant colors and practical design make it a delightful addition to any bathroom decor, offering both functionality and style. Perfect for organizing your essentials while adding a splash of color.
